fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — ready to help you build something innovative. Here's what we can do:

🤖 Custom Robot Design
"Create a quadruped robot that can walk and turn"
"Build a humanoid with arms that can wave and reach"
"Design a robotic arm that can pick and place objects"

⚙️ Physics & Simulation
"Test different gravity settings on my robot"
"Add collision detection between multiple robots"
"Simulate a robot climbing stairs or slopes"

🛠️ Build & Experiment
"Make the robot respond to keyboard controls"
"Add sensors to track the robot's position"
"Create a simple obstacle course environment"
